DP.538.0000:
The weather and the terrain here
are much more extreme than Sinnoh.\f
I imagine there would be a large
variety of Pokémon here.
DP.538.0001:
It’s not only Sinnoh’s best that
gather at the Battle Tower.\f
We’re talking about the best Trainers
in the world.\f
It must be cool being able to get
your own Pokémon and battle against\r
people like you around the world!
DP.538.0002:
Wow, you’ve seen all the Pokémon in
Sinnoh?!\f
That’s awesome! I’m gonna travel with
Pokémon when I get big like you!
DP.538.0003:
